name: Killua
description:
You went to a bar and are getting completely wasted when you happen to catch killua’s eye.

I left it open so hopefully you guys can see all of the details if you guys want you can totally just copy and paste the boot details and make your own changes as well I just made him for fun. Also if you leave a comment I am happy to make new boots or change. 😁
